      3 sustainability features

      Sustainability features

      This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
      Energy efficiency
      Conserves energy compared to similar products.
      As certified by
      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

      Learn more about this certification

      EPEAT

      EPEAT

      EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

      Learn more about this certification

      Certification Level

      GOLD
      Safer chemicals
      Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.
      As certified by
      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

      Learn more about this certification

      Manufacturing practices
      Manufactured using processes that reduce the risk of negative environmental impact.
      As certified by
      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO

      ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

      About this item

      • MULTIPLE TASKS WITH ONE ASK: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend— your Galaxy S25 Ultra handles multiple tasks with a single ask.¹
      • START THE DAY SMARTER: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it with Now Brief.²
      • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: AI Camera with Audio Eraser lets you capture vibrant videos in low light and minimize unwanted noises so you can relive your favorite moments with fewer distractions.³
      • BRING OUT THE BEST IN EVERY FACE: Capture every portrait with clarity and confidence on the Galaxy S25 Ultra. The advanced portrait features adjust skin tones and preserve natural textures, giving every shot a polished, professional look.
      • SWITCHING IS QUICK & EASY: With Smart Switch, you can move your pics, videos, music, apps, contacts and convos to their new home, safely and securely, in just a few simple steps.
      › See more product details

      Product Description

      Galaxy S25 Ultra handles the small details so you can focus on staying in the moment. Get several tasks fulfilled with one simple ask, and get insightful tips throughout your day to stay one step ahead. Simplify life with AI¹⁰ that evolves with you to work better for you.

      ¹Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. ²Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection). ³Compatible with common video formats accessible in Gallery; helps minimize six sounds (Voice/speech, Music, Noise, Crowd, Nature, Wind). Utilizes AI; results vary. ⁴As compared to Galaxy S24 Ultra. ⁵Requires screen resolution setting to QHD+. ⁶Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.)

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers praise the phone's exceptional build quality, premium look and feel, and amazing camera capabilities, with one customer highlighting its 200MP main sensor that captures crazy detail. The device features incredible battery life with over 50% charge remaining, and customers find it highly efficient and worth the price, particularly noting it's cheaper than going through Verizon. While some customers report solid performance, others mention issues with the device being disabled.
      AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

      276 customers mention phone quality, 252 positive, 24 negative276 customers mention "Phone quality"252 positive24 negative
      Customers find the phone to be of exceptional quality, with one customer describing it as a workhorse.
      "Great phone. Transfer of data from my S20 to this one very quick. Being familiar already with a Samsung has made it a breeze using this one. Love it." Read more
      "Awesome phone, safe delivery through Amazon, and great deal. Only downside is there isn't a micro sd card slot to expand storage." Read more

      "Samsung is the best phone you can ever have for me I don’t know about others but I would advise others to give it a try I love Samsung" Read more
      109 customers mention camera quality, 100 positive, 9 negative109 customers mention "Camera quality"100 positive9 negative
      Customers praise the phone's camera quality, noting that it takes excellent pictures and videos with great resolution and clear screen display, with one customer highlighting its performance in low light conditions.
      "Lightweight, fast, durable build and great camera. We run our entire business off of these phones and they are simply incredible!..." Read more
      "I love this phone. I chose this because of the camera quality, and I wasn't disappointed the camera is phenomenal!..." Read more
      "...The screen is bright, clear, and very vibrant, making videos and photos look amazing. The battery life easily lasts all day with normal use...." Read more
      "...It came safe and untampered in the mail. The camera quality is great, and of course, you can edit the settings to your liking...." Read more
      99 customers mention value for money, 80 positive, 19 negative99 customers mention "Value for money"80 positive19 negative

      "The best phone I've ever had, its worth every penny. The battery life is incredible and the load times are lightning fast." Read more
      "...I believe it was anyway not a mark on the phone. Great price for it and works great thank you seller...." Read more
      "Thanks Amazon for the good price on this s25 ultra phone! It was better than my phone carrier's price. It is a great phone to use...." Read more
      "Good buy 👍" Read more
      97 customers mention battery life, 71 positive, 26 negative97 customers mention "Battery life"71 positive26 negative
      Customers are satisfied with the phone's battery life, noting that it holds over 50% charge and charges quickly. One customer mentions it provides up to 6-9 hours of standby time.
      "Not worth the high price. Battery life and faster charging was my main reasons for wanting a new phone, but it wasn't actually better than my..." Read more
      "...It was quite easy and very fast. The battery life is good. At this point I am really a big fan of this phone and so glad I took the plunge." Read more
      "Terrible battery life, drain very very fast" Read more
      "...Great operating system great battery life love the stylus. Phone functionality: Functions Great" Read more

      Customers find the phone's speed amazing and highly efficient.

      "Good phone and very fast and responsive. Amazing camera and worth the money." Read more
      "...It was a big upgrade from her Note 10 Lol. It is just awesome. Super fast and all the bells and whistles! And the best camera by far!..." Read more
      "Great screen, fast processor, sharp cameras and slim, sturdy build quality all combine to make this device the best phone I've ever used." Read more

      Customers appreciate the phone's appearance, noting its premium look and feel.

      "Excellent smartphone, speed is fast, pix are super clear, looks great. Pricey, but so worth it." Read more

      "This is just a beautiful phone I have an s 24 now I bought an s25 for my wife this is just a beautiful phone I have no words I think it is really..." Read more

      Customers praise the phone's camera capabilities, with one customer highlighting its 200MP main sensor that captures incredible detail.
      "Great phone, amazing camera, it feels great, still hate the S pen not havjng bluetooth but I don't use it enough to care" Read more
      "I upgraded from S22+. Love the extra features and the camera. I got the 512G. Battery life is good. Love the clarity of the pictures." Read more
      "Very happy so far. The camera is amazing. I had the s 22 ultra. Time for an upgrade. Battery life is good." Read more

      125 customers mention reliability, 75 positive, 50 negative125 customers mention "Reliability"75 positive50 negative
      Customers have mixed experiences with the phone's reliability, with some reporting it works well and performs solidly, while others mention issues with non-functioning units and disabled devices.
      "...And, it works great. Reception is a little better than any of my old phones even at my house in the boonies...." Read more
      "...este mensaje de Samsung que lo bloqueó permanentemente: "The device is disabled because it was reported as lost, stolen or has a balance due for..." Read more
      "Absolutely love this phone! It’s fast, reliable, and has plenty of memory for all my apps, project files, and photos...." Read more
      "...soon as it arrived i tried to set it up and got shocked that the phone is disabled, warning says it's lost or stolen phone, really surprised because..." Read more

      Top reviews from the United States

      • Tori
        5 out of 5 stars
        Mother Approves
        Reviewed in the United States on July 12, 2026
        Color: Titanium SilverblueSize: 512GBStyle: S25 UltraPattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I bought this phone for my mom and she loves it. It is a nice screen size that’s perfect for watching videos. Picture quality is great. Battery last a long time before it needs to be charged again and it’s much quicker. She loves that it is unlocked so we can go to any phone carrier for service. It’s expensive but it’s a good quality phone that will last since Samsung makes great products. She lost the pen so I will say Samsung should design the phone better so that does not happen.

      • Jay
        5 out of 5 stars
        Wow! Exceeded my expectations in every way.. Love it!
        Reviewed in the United States on December 17, 2025
        Color: Titanium BlackSize: 256GBStyle: S25 UltraPattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Been buying cell phones since the beginning all the way back to when they were called car phones, lol (shows my age)

        Once they went to texting and smart phones I have always bought budget model phones Samsung, Moto, etc.. I never really used them for more than texting and phone calls. Then came 2FA and apps for everything. I have always liked Samsung phones, I was ready for a new device and this time I decided to look at the top tier devices during the sales.

        NEVER APPLE or ONE PLUS so would be Pixel 10 Pro or S25 Ultra. Bought both...

        Usually I spent $150 -$200 and they get the job done so I was sceptical on spending $1K on a phone. The Pixel was ok, though not worth it over what I already had. Then the Samsung S25 Ultra arrived (with a free bundled set or Pro 3 Ear Buds) and all I can say is Wow!

        This thing is built like a tank, super quality construction. Love the material, screen OLED is amazing, camera is outstanding and the audio synced with the Pro 3 Buds is unreal. Put Spotify on and I hear thing in songs I have never heard before, the clarity and frequency response is like nothing I have ever heard before.

        I love Samsung because you can customize almost everything about this phone, they don't load it with bloat, and they make it easy to disable features if you don't want them, unlike some other brands. I run mine pretty lean without a lot of background stuff going and the battery charge lasts longer than any other phone I have had. I did not expect that at all. And it charges fast.

        Has every function I could possibly need and more is I want it. The feel is pure quality, has the durable OLED glass for protection. This thing has exceeded my expectations in every way and if you can get one, it is well worth it. IMO

        Read moreRead less

      • Zain
        5 out of 5 stars
        Great phone, but some feedback for future iterations
        Reviewed in the United States on December 23, 2025
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Phone is a beast that hasn't flinched at anything I threw at it. Cameras have been great. Software is best in class, s pen is handy for quick notes. I do have some feedback for samsung though, some of these are nitpicks but I do wanna bring those up.

        - Camera is great for my usage but it would be great if the array of cameras was in a horizontal visor akin to the pixel

        -OIS on the space zoom camera. Sometimes I use my phone like binoculars when hiking and wanna snap a quick pic. Also maybe copy some ideas from apple like the camera button, the magnetic sensor shift stabilization, and square sensor.

        - More ram would be appreciated, 12gb is no slouch and I have no doubts it won't be a painpoint but competitors like google have it albeit with a much weaker chip. It's not that the phone isn't future proof, it's more that there could be more to be done. That being said the RAM shortage is surely gonna keep 12gb the standard for the foreseeable. future.

        -PLEASE KEEP THE SPEN. I don't care for bluetooth functionality but other people do. I just like it for quick notes and using it like a mouse. Honestly I wouldn't consider this phone if it didn't have it.

        -Silicon carbon battery? Now the battery has been able to last me a full day with the light performance profile, 1080p resolution, mostly on wifi, 6-9 hours of SoT depending what I'm doing. I do understand the US has some regulations on battery capacity and samsung might still have ptsd from the note 7, but companies like oneplus have it. Yes they do age faster then conventional batteries but even so, an aged silicon carbon battery can still have better battery than a conventional lithium ion.

        -I don't really play games on my phone, mostly use my steamdeck for that but I'm just gonna throw this out there... a sprititual successor to the xperia play would make me so happy.

        -Samsung I love oneui but please stop making duplicate apps for everything. It's a minor annoyance since you can uninstall/hide everything but come on don't be annoying.

        -speech to type is better on the pixel from what I've read online

        -maybe support the aptx adaptive and aptx hd bluetooth codecs

        -Bring gemini to android auto. Now I'm not a big ai user I turn off most everything except gemini and circle to search, I think it's obnoxiously implemented but google assistant is just plain stupid when using android auto. Also while on the topic of gemini, I want to be able to tell gemini "play *song* by *artist* and it not be limited to youtube music and spotify. I wanna use other services like deezer or my locally downloaded music.

        -front facing speakers. I appreciate the stereospeakers but how cool would it be if we had both speakers front facing?

        -finally please implement a "hold for me" and call tree like pixels do. I know it sounds like I'm just envying pixel software feature but that would seriously be game over. Phone trees seems to be brain numbing nowadays and hold music is a form of torture.

        Read moreRead less

      • Cory K
        5 out of 5 stars
        Excellent phone and worth the upgrade
        Reviewed in the United States on November 16, 2025
        Color: Titanium WhitesilverSize: 256GBStyle: S25 UltraPattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        The S25 Ultra is a very nice upgrade, especially from my old S9 Plus, better cameras, connectivity and a much faster operating system. I thought I would miss the option of having a micro SD slot however the 256GB is actually plenty, I'm storing over several thousand images and 4K videos and still only 1/3 full. The phone dimensions are similar to most flagship models on the market but the S25 is noticeably heavy and still tough to carry in your pants pocket, can be difficult to remove depending on what your wearing and if your sitting. The phone feels stronger however I use a case to protect it, makes is easier to hold and protects it from drops. I don't use screen protectors and so far after several months of daily carrying in pockets, taking to the beach and covered in sand, and carrying around the yard while working, I still haven't noticed any scratches on the screen or camera lenses.

        The new AI features are helpful and can be fun, Samsung has their own AI apps and so far the drawing assist is my favorite, some of the apps work best with a pen and the one included with the phone is actually very good. I didn't think I'd ever use it and was planning to hold on buying a new phone until the next model arrives, if they offered an Ultra without a pen, but I'm glad I got this one. It's also great if your hands are dirty and you don't want to touch the screen, it doesn't have any remote options for taking pictures but still works very well for most tasks.

        The cameras are amazing, vibrant images and taking pictures at night actually works. It does a good job of not overexposing lights in the background and clearly capturing the subject in front. The AI clears up a lot of the ghosting effect you get when the subject moves and the phone is set to a long exposure time. I'm glad I'm finally able to capture family moments when there's insufficient lighting, missed a lot of good opportunities with the last phone.

        So far the phone has been perfect and I'm glad I finally upgraded.

      • Wendy L.
        5 out of 5 stars
        Beautiful, Super Functional Phone! One of Samsung's Best.
        Reviewed in the United States on July 16, 2025
        Color: Titanium BlackSize: 512GBStyle: S25 UltraPattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I didn't buy this for myself. My Hubby wanted this particular phone when we switched from one of the "Big Three" phone companies to a smaller, cheaper service. We bought it unlocked for a GSM service, usable and compatible with our new phone plan. I've only gotten to hold this thing a couple of times, but I have a lot to say about it!

        First, this phone is enormous! He upgraded from a Galaxy S21 FE 5G, which I thought was close in size, but somehow, the S25 feels much bigger. It's quite hefty in weight, too, which is perfect for the tremor he has in his left hand. Having a heavier object tends to squelch the shaking a bit. The display is crystal clear and brilliant. Movies and TV shows never looked so good on a handheld device as they do with this one. Games run super fast with no lag, and charging takes no time at all with a proper fast charging system.

        And now, the feature I've wanted in a phone for a long time...? The smart pen/stylus. Man, this thing is slick. I had to use it to capture my signature for an e-sign document. For once, my signature actually looked like I had signed it. Getting the file from his phone to my PC was pretty simple to do, as they connected via Bluetooth to do so. The stylus has a cozy little home tucked into its own space and won't come out (or it hasn't yet) by just dropping or knocking the phone against something. That thing is in there for the long haul until you want it out.

        This phone is everything I've come to expect from Samsung's Galaxy S series. A bit on the pricey side, but to him, it's worth every penny. He loves the Titanium Black color he purchased, as he fancies the darker colors with phones and just about everything else. At least he coordinates! The bright, AMOLED display is crystal clear with brilliant, vivid colors. It's such a neat phone, one like I've always wanted for myself, but could never quite afford.

        Spring for a new phone and get this beauty. You really won't be sorry.

        Read moreRead less

      • Anonymous customer
        4 out of 5 stars
        Excellent little powerhouse
        Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026
        Color: Titanium SilverblueSize: 256GBStyle: S25 UltraPattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        The Samsung S25 Ultra is an excellent phone from a hardware standpoint. The screen is beautiful, the speakers are loud and clear, and the camera takes great photos. Cell service and internet connectivity have been solid and reliable with no complaints. When I first purchased the phone, the battery life was outstanding—easily close to two full days and comparable to the iPhone 16 Pro Max. Unfortunately, after being forced to install software updates, that battery performance dropped noticeably. What was once amazing is now just decent, with the phone ending a full day around 16% battery, even though I limit charging to 85% to preserve long-term battery health. This feels more like a software optimization issue than a hardware problem, which is disappointing. Bixby and Samsung’s built-in ecosystem are underwhelming to me, but Google’s Assistant AI works very well, and if you don’t like either option, using ChatGPT is a solid alternative. The S Pen is a nice added bonus and genuinely useful at times. The phone itself feels durable, though I still recommend using a case for extra protection. I purchased a new phone and received a new phone and perfect condition. I also haven’t experienced any screen burn-in issues, even with the always-on display enabled. Overall, it’s a powerful and premium device with excellent features, but software updates and battery regression keep it from being a top-tier experience.

        Read moreRead less

        Powerful, Smooth and Worth the Upgrade

        This Samsung phone exceeds my expectations. The performance is fast and smooth, and apps open quickly without any lag. The screen is bright, clear, and very vibrant, making videos and photos look amazing. The battery life easily lasts all day with normal use. The camera quality is excellent, especially in low light. The build feels premium and solid in hand. Overall, this is a reliable and high-quality smartphone. I’m very happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend it.

      Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, 256GB Smartphone, Unlocked Android, AI Night Mode Camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite Fast Processor, 5000mAh Battery, Built-in S Pen, 2025, US 1 Yr Warranty, Titanium Silverblue

      From Samsung

      4.7 out of 5 stars, 3,380 ratings

      Customer reviews

      Price

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • MULTIPLE TASKS WITH ONE ASK: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend— your Galaxy S25 Ultra handles multiple tasks with a single ask.¹
      • START THE DAY SMARTER: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it with Now Brief.²
      • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: AI Camera with Audio Eraser lets you capture vibrant videos in low light and minimize unwanted noises so you can relive your favorite moments with fewer distractions.³
      • BRING OUT THE BEST IN EVERY FACE: Capture every portrait with clarity and confidence on the Galaxy S25 Ultra. The advanced portrait features adjust skin tones and preserve natural textures, giving every shot a polished, professional look.
      • SWITCHING IS QUICK & EASY: With Smart Switch, you can move your pics, videos, music, apps, contacts and convos to their new home, safely and securely, in just a few simple steps.

      Product Description

      Galaxy S25 Ultra handles the small details so you can focus on staying in the moment. Get several tasks fulfilled with one simple ask, and get insightful tips throughout your day to stay one step ahead. Simplify life with AI¹⁰ that evolves with you to work better for you.

      ¹Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. ²Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection). ³Compatible with common video formats accessible in Gallery; helps minimize six sounds (Voice/speech, Music, Noise, Crowd, Nature, Wind). Utilizes AI; results vary. ⁴As compared to Galaxy S24 Ultra. ⁵Requires screen resolution setting to QHD+. ⁶Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.)

      Newer Version Available
